ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Motion For Second Order Enforcing Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jun-10-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Lassart, Esq. ROPERS MAJESKI KOHN BENTLEY, 333 Market St.,Suite 3150, San Francisco, CA 94105, 415-274-6303 for Plaintiff and moving party D&S Auto and Kevin Rui Yean Gee.

Char Meaney, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, Department of Justice, 455 Golden Gate Avenue, Suite 11000, San Francisco, CA 94102-7004 on behalf of Defendant and opposing party California Department of Consumer Affairs, Bureau of Auto Repairs.

No tentative ruling was issued regarding this motion. After argument the Court clarified its original order explaining a trial de novo was required for the entire matter not just the mitigation or penalty phase. PETITIONER D & S AUTO SERVICE & BODY WORKS Motion For Second Order Enforcing Peremptory Writ Of Mandate was taken under submission. (JJM/dr) Reported by Eric Throne, CSR # 7855
